# Aitotech — llms.txt

> AitoTech is an AI company in Delhi, India.
> Routely is our AI coding platform — SAIRA Phase 1 with Omni, Harness, Hermes, and cold-start routing.

## Company
- Name: AitoTech
- Website: https://aitotech.in
- Email: info@aitotech.in

## Product: Routely
- URL: https://aitotech.in/routely
- Try in browser: https://app.routely.aitotech.in
- What: SAIRA Phase 1 — Omni chat, Harness IDE, Hermes memory, cold-start model routing
- Demo: https://aitotech.in/routely/demo?tour=1 (Phase 1 mock UI with guided tour)
- Waitlist: https://aitotech.in/routely#waitlist
- Docs: https://aitotech.in/docs

## Key features (Phase 1 — coding only)
- Omni — task classification and chat with routing badges
- Harness — browser IDE (files, editor, preview, terminal)
- Hermes — threads and extracted skills (persistent memory)
- Cold-start routing (OpenRouter free models — user never picks a model)
- Event loop: PERCEIVE → DECIDE → ACT → REMEMBER → IMPROVE

## FAQ
- Q: What is Routely?
  A: AitoTech's coding platform. SAIRA Phase 1 = Omni + Harness + Hermes with automatic routing.
- Q: Do I choose an AI model?
  A: No. SAIRA routes by task class (CODE_GEN, DEBUG, DEPLOY, etc.) to the best free model.
- Q: Is it only for coding?
  A: Yes for now. General assistant features come later.
